steps.title: Identify the decisive clue
steps.content: The phrase “without looking at the rest of us” is key. It shows that Esteban didn't pause, turn, or acknowledge anyone—he moved straight ahead on a single path.

steps.title: Apply the meaning
steps.content: ”Straight” must describe direct movement along a single path. “Directly” (choice C) expresses that exactly. The other choices don't describe movement: delighted (emotion), truthfully (honesty), and formally (formal manner). That matches choice C — C is correct.
